conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const a = String($json.headers?.['x-backup-secret'] ?? $json.headers?.['X-Backup-Secret'] ?? ''); const b = String($env.BACKUP_WEBHOOK_SECRET ?? ''); if (!a || !b) return false; const ba = Buffer.from(a, 'utf8'); const bb = Buffer.from(b, 'utf8'); if (ba.length !== bb.length) return false; const crypto = require('crypto'); return crypto.timingSafeEqual(ba, bb); })() }}

parameters.command: set -euo pipefail; REPO="${VERGEO5_REPO_ROOT:-/home/opc/vergeo5}"; cd "$REPO"; set -a; [ -f infra/.env ] && . ./infra/.env; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; export BACKUP_MODE="${BACKUP_MODE:-scheduled}"; bash "infra/scripts/db-dump.sh"
set -euo pipefail; REPO="${VERGEO5_REPO_ROOT:-/home/opc/vergeo5}"; cd "$REPO"; set -a; [ -f infra/.env ] && . ./infra/.env; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; bash "infra/scripts/db-backup-watchdog.sh"

set -euo pipefail; REPO="${VERGEO5_REPO_ROOT:-/home/opc/vergeo5}"; cd "$REPO"; set -a; [ -f infra/.env ] && . ./infra/.env; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; export BACKUP_MODE="${BACKUP_MODE:-manual}"; bash "infra/scripts/db-dump.sh"

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, mode: "manual", stdout_tail: String($json.stdout || "").slice(-500).replace(/postgres(?:ql)?:\/\/[^\s'"]+/gi, "postgres://***") }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, error: "backup_failed", code: $('SSH Manual Dump').item.json.code ?? 1, reasons: $('Build Alert Payload Manual').item.json.reasons ?? [] }) }}

meta.description: Nightly pg_dump→gzip→OCI Object Storage (independent of Supabase PITR) via SSH to OCI host. Missed-schedule watchdog 04:00 Africa/Lusaka. Manual drill: POST /webhook/backup-manual with X-Backup-Secret. Alerts via WhatsApp (metadata only). STATUS: CODE_COMPLETE — G7 PASS still requires a real dated dump + timed restore evidence.
